name: NIST AI RMF: MAP — Impacts Characterized
description: Potential impacts, benefits and risks to individuals, groups, communities and society are mapped.
rationale: NIST AI RMF MAP 5: impacts to individuals, groups, communities, organizations and society are characterized.

examples.fails: the required risk-management step is absent

source: NIST AI Risk Management Framework (AI RMF 1.0), NIST AI 100-1, 26 Jan 2023 — voluntary framework organised around GOVERN, MAP, MEASURE, MANAGE. https://www.nist.gov/itl/ai-risk-management-framework
